evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: SQL mastery; data modeling expertise; Monitor production data integrity; organizational rigor; you build it, you run it
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: strong emphasis on quality, modeling, integrity monitoring, and ownership mindset dominate; no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk: data integrity monitoring; second-hand business model; sustainable innovation commitment
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: e-commerce/circular economy domain without financial/regulatory consequence; data integrity concern is operational.
evidence.data_team_maturity: design optimized datasets; dashboard performance; proof-of-concept projects with generative AI
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named tools (dbt, Databricks, Tableau) in responsibilities, PoCs with AI suggest growing but not fully established function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design optimized datasets and ensure dashboard performance; Monitor production data integrity and resolve incidents; Lead proof-of-concept projects with generative AI tools
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific technical ownership (dataset optimization, incident resolution, PoC leadership) shows domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: work with business teams to define KPIs; create documentation for independent user work
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role enables business teams' self-service analytics through data infrastructure and documentation.
evidence.autonomy_level: design; ensure; monitor; resolve; lead PoCs; collaborate with business teams
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: candidate owns defined technical domains (dashboards, data integrity, PoCs) within business team collaboration.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: JD mentions generative AI tools in PoCs but not as expected candidate skill; no AI coding/enablement signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Tool listed: dbt mentioned in preferred tech stack without explicit testing ownership responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Monitor production data integrity and resolve incidents; organizational rigor; you build it, you run it
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: operational reliability and incident response signal concern for pipeline stability, secondary to feature delivery.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design optimized datasets; Monitor production data integrity; Lead proof-of-concept projects
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: improving and optimizing existing data infrastructure for new business model (circularity), not greenfield.
evidence.loss_aversion: Monitor production data integrity and resolve incidents; you build it, you run it mentality.
